title: croton draco subsp. panamensis
intro: Croton draco subsp. panamensis, also known as the dragon's blood tree, is a subspecies of the Croton draco tree, a plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Croton draco subsp. panamensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from pain and fever. In herbal preparations, the resin of the plant is often extracted and used to create tinctures, capsules, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
